description: CTVAM (Cybersecurity Threat & Vulnerability Analysis Model) is a modular framework for ingesting NVD CVE data, preprocessing vulnerability metrics, performing feature engineering, generating analytics, and applying machine-learning models for severity prediction and risk insights.

An end-to-end technical repository featuring hands-on notebooks across the full AI stack: Statistics, Machine Learning, Deep Learning, GenAI, and Agentic frameworks. Focused on 2026 industry standards, this collection bridges the gap between fundamental revision and experimental AI development.

A growing collection of fundamental Machine Learning algorithms implemented completely from scratch using Python and `numpy`. This repository serves as an educational resource to understand the inner workings of various ML models without relying on high-level frameworks like scikit-learn for the core logic.

A web app, using Python, Flask Framework, that allows users to predict future floods, using machine learning, based on weather forecast data. Also to visualize current and upcoming floods using Plots, Heat maps and real-time satellite images.

Mind Monitor AI is a machine learning framework designed to detect early indicators of depression, anxiety, and psychological distress within social media text using Natural Language Processing and sentiment analysis.

This repository provides the code for the study Estimating Immune Age from B-Cell Receptor Repertoire Using Machine Learning. It implements an end-to-end framework for extracting multi-dimensional bulk BCR repertoire features and training machine learning models to quantify immunosenescence.

An experiment to work with quantum machine learning framework with Variational Quantum Circuits(VQC) as a tunable circuit.

A web application, using Python, Flask Framework, that allows users to predict the calories burnt, using machine learning algorithms, based on physiological and activity data. Outcome: Identified factors most influencing calorie burn and build an accurate model..
Collection of machine learning projects spanning healthcare prediction, business analytics, and NLP - built with Python, scikit-learn, and deep learning frameworks.

Machine learning framework for detecting, classifying, and correcting harmonic distortions in power system signals using signal processing and deep learning techniques.

A hybrid image encryption framework fusing machine learning and chaotic cryptography. It utilizes ML to classify image blocks by information density, enabling adaptive selective encryption. Combining bit-plane manipulation, chaotic maps, and multiple S-boxes, it optimizes speed and security for real-time IoT and resource-constrained environments.

A hybrid **AI + physics-driven optimization framework** for CNC machining of Medium-Density Fibreboard (MDF).   This project combines physics-based machining models and machine learning models to predict machining behavior, optimize cutting parameters, and automatically regenerate CNC G-code for improved machining performance.

This project implements a hand gesture recognition system using computer vision and machine learning techniques. It detects and classifies hand gestures from images or real-time webcam input, enabling touchless humancomputer interaction. The system is built using Python with libraries such as OpenCV and deep learning frameworks.
